articles.title: Chevron Says Damage to Wheatstone Gas Facility to Affect Restart - Bloomberg.com
articles.description: Storm damage to Chevron Corp.’s Wheatstone gas plant in Australia is hampering efforts to restart operations and the facility won’t be back online fully for weeks, adding further strain to the global LNG market.
